videoDetails.title: Honoring Activist Shirley Raines | The View
videoDetails.shortDescription:
We're honoring Beauty 2 The Streetz founder and activist Shirley Raines, better known as Ms. Shirley, this Black History Month! She devoted her life to seeing the beauty in others and her mission focused on providing the unhoused in LA's Skid Row with “self-worth restoring services.”

Subscribe to our YouTube channel: http://bit.ly/2Ybi4tM
